description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling

diff: The voting outcome is determined by the amount of SKY vote-weight allocated to the Executive Vote. If a proposal does not receive more SKY vote-weight than the current hat, it will not be scheduled for execution and will eventually expire; SKY holders can continue supporting it or redirect their vote-weight to another proposal, often the previously approved one, to maintain the status quo. For details of the execution process see [A.1.
